title: Nurse, Mental Health and Substance Abuse Services, Turku
meta_description: Apply now for a Nurse, Mental Health and Substance Abuse Services, Turku role at Varsinais-Suomen hyvinvointialue.
description: We are seeking a qualified nurse with experience in mental health and substance abuse services to join our team at Varsinais-Suomen hyvinvointialue, located in Turku. As a full-time employee, you will contribute to the comprehensive implementation of compensation treatment that includes drug treatment and various forms of psychosocial support. Your skills and vision will have a significant impact on patients' lives. We offer a supportive environment where your views are valued and your contributions are recognized. Our community is built on cooperation, openness, and shared goals for continuous improvement. A 6-month trial period follows the employment relationship, ensuring a smooth transition into our team.
what_we_expect: Good collaboration skills
Initiative
Flexibility and good problem-solving skills
Eagerness to join us to do meaningful work
job_responsibilities: As a nurse, you work as part of a multi-professional team for reimbursement care. You are responsible for the comprehensive implementation of compensation treatment, which includes, in addition to drug treatment, the provision of various forms of psychosocial support.
You can also get training for these.
Submitting the application: The application must be submitted via the electronic application form.
what_we_offer: You get involved in activities where your skills are valued and your views are listened to.
You get the support of a multi-professional team and the support of your supervisors.
Submitting the application: The application must be submitted via the electronic application form.
search_keywords: Nurse, Mental Health and Substance Abuse Services, Turku

title: Lord of the Church
salary_range: According to the K30 pay grade
meta_description: Looking for a Lord of the Church job in Lieksa? Lieksan Seurakunta, Lieksa is seeking motivated candidates—apply today.
description: We are seeking an experienced priest to fill the vacant position of Vicar of Lieksa Parish within Lieksan Seurakunta. This role requires excellent oral and written Finnish language skills, as well as a satisfactory understanding of Swedish. The ideal candidate should possess leadership abilities, administrative skills, and the ability to network with ecclesiastical actors and stakeholders. A background in pastoral work management is also required. Applications must be submitted via KirkkoRekry by April 25, 2026, at 15:00. The successful candidate will lead worship life, develop operating methods, and enhance the parish's strategic work while maintaining confidentiality and promoting dialogue within society. A criminal record check is required for this position.

Supervise religious communities
Give spiritual advice
Perform religious ceremonies
Represents a religious institution
Promote dialogue in society

title: Hoiva assistant, Onnelanpollu service center, Lahti
meta_description: Join Päijät-Hämeen hyvinvointialue as a Hoiva assistant, Onnelanpollu service center, Lahti and grow your career in Lahti. Check details and apply now.
description: We are currently seeking a Hoiva assistant for the Onnelanpollu service center in Lahti, Finland. This position offers full-time employment with permanent continuity and a competitive salary of €2,281,65 per month. The role involves providing care assistance to elderly residents at our 48-bed serviced housing unit. We are looking for individuals who can contribute their skills in kitchen maintenance, clothing care, nursing tasks, and other supportive roles. Our positive work community offers a supportive environment with opportunities for growth and development. Applicants must have experience as a care assistant, completed a hygiene passport, and demonstrated fluency in Finnish language skills at the B1 level or higher.

The ability to lift up to 25 kg, as well as manual dexterity and good hand-eye coordination
Ability to communicate effectively in Finnish with a B1 level of proficiency
job_responsibilities: Assisting elderly individuals with daily tasks such as cooking, cleaning, and personal care
Coordinating the work schedule of other staff members
what_we_offer: A positive and supportive work environment
Flexible working hours that allow for the reconciliation of work, family, and free time
Access to health benefits including exercise, cultural, and wellness programs
Vacation benefits and community events and recreation days

title: Early childhood education teacher
meta_description: Join Vaasan kaupunki as a Early childhood education teacher / Länsimetsä daycare center and grow your career in Vaasa. Check details and apply now.
description: We are looking for an early childhood education teacher to join Länsimetsä daycare center in Gerbyy, Vaasa. This position offers a competitive salary of €2823/month and benefits including city services, employee bicycle benefit, and e-pass culture, exercise, and well-being. The ideal candidate should have strong pedagogical skills, be able to work effectively with parents, and possess excellent interaction and cooperation abilities. A doctor's statement about health (T-certificate) and a criminal record extract are required before starting the trial period of six months. The Infectious Diseases Act mandates investigating tuberculosis risk for childcare workers. Prior qualifications in early childhood education are preferred but not mandatory.

Activity and initiative
Good interaction skills to support the well-being of the work community, children and families
Flexibility to act in changing everyday situations
job_responsibilities: Responsible for the group's high-quality pedagogy, planning and evaluation, as well as cooperation with parents.

Benefit 3: e-pass culture, exercise and well-being benefit
